zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal於1462年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾吉德布萊特時，她的父親Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland32歲，母親Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland30歲。她於1482年1月11日與Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年4月22日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal于1462年出生在苏格兰度福利爾吉德布萊特时，她的父亲Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland32岁，母亲Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland30岁。她于1482年1月11日与Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年4月22日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal was born in 1462, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, was 32 and her mother, Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 30. She married Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal on 11 January 1482, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 22 April 1525, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal est née en 1462, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal le 11 janvier 1482, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 avril 1525, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal 1462 in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland 30. Sie hat am 11. Januar 1482 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. April 1525 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal è nata il nel 1462 nel Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal il 11 gennaio 1482, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 22 aprile 1525, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischalが1462年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリトで生まれた時，父Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotlandは32歳，母Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotlandは30歳であった。1482年1月11日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでSir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年4月22日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで63歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal(이)가 1462년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 커kc드브라이트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1482년 1월 11일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 4월 22일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal nasceu em 1462, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal em 11 de janeiro de 1482, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de abril de 1525, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ro.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal родилась в 1462 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal 11 января 1482 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 22 апреля 1525 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

sm.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Sikotilandi, United Kingdom

sk.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Škótsko, Spojené kráľovstvo

es.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal nació en 1462, en Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Annabella Stewart Princess of Scotland, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal el 11 de enero de 1482, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 22 de abril de 1525, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
